studio.title: AI Content Architect
studio.welcome: Hello! Ready to architect your next campaign? What's on your mind today?
studio.empty_body: Your AI-generated content will appear here.
studio.draft_received: I've drafted content for you based on our conversation and your knowledge base.

studio.steering_placeholder: e.g. Focus on Product A this week...

conn.title: Social Connections
conn.subtitle: Network

conn.confirm_disconnect: Are you sure you want to disconnect this account?

auto.title: Autopilot Systems
auto.subtitle: Automation Engine
auto.description: Configure how your Digital Twin interacts across platforms without manual intervention.
auto.master_desc: When enabled, the AI will autonomously generate, schedule, and publish content based on your Persona Matrix and active campaigns.
auto.ai_rec_desc: Based on current audience engagement peaks, 4-6 posts per day is optimal for your current reach goals.
auto.steering_placeholder: e.g. Focus on our new minimalist design launch...
auto.steering_desc: This overrides standard persona behaviors to prioritize specific themes or announcements for the next 7 days.
auto.safety_topics: No controversial topics filter is ON
